base_url.description: Slack Web API base URL override for tests or proxies.

api_token.description: Slack API token (xoxb- bot token or a direct API token), sent as a Bearer Authorization header. Provide either api_token or access_token; api_token takes precedence when both are set.

access_token.description: Slack OAuth access token (xoxb-/xoxp-), sent as a Bearer Authorization header. Provide either api_token or access_token.

channel_id.description: Slack channel ID to read history from. Required only for the channel_messages stream.

page_size.description: Records per page (1-1000, Slack's limit param).

max_pages.description: Optional hard cap on the number of pages read per stream, consumed by hooks/slack/hooks.go's StreamHook. Permissive parse: empty, "all", or "unlimited" means unbounded; a positive integer string caps the page count at that value.
